prompt:
Remove GUI desktop and Sunshine remoting capability from classic-laddie, converting it to a headless server.

Changes needed:

1. hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix:
   - Remove the import of ../../modules/common/workstation.nix (line 13)
   - Remove the import of ../../modules/common/remoting.nix (line 14)
   - Remove the 'Remote Desktop Streaming' section (lines 27-29: the comment and modules.remoting.enable = true)
   - Remove the 'AUTO-LOGIN' section (lines 60-64: the comment and services.displayManager.autoLogin block) since it only existed for headless streaming
   - Remove the sunshine package override (lines 66-67: the comment and services.sunshine.package line)

2. flake.nix:
   - In the classic-laddie nixosConfiguration home-manager imports (around lines 122-126), remove ./home/workstation.nix and ./home/remoting.nix, keeping only ./home/identities/personal.nix

Do NOT modify:
- hardware.nix (NVIDIA drivers are still needed for media transcoding and VM GPU passthrough)
- The workstation.nix or remoting.nix module files themselves (other hosts may use them)
- Any other host configurations
